title: Prioritizing Veterans’ Survivors Act
stage_label: Received in the Senate and Read twice and referred to the Committee on Veterans' Affairs.
crs_summary: Prioritizing Veterans' Survivors Act  This bill provides that the Office of Survivors Assistance (OSA) must operate within the Office of the Secretary of the Department of Veterans Affairs. (Currently, OSA operates within the Pension and Fiduciary Service of the Veterans Benefits Administration.)
last_action_text: Received in the Senate and Read twice and referred to the Committee on Veterans' Affairs.
